name: Pillsbury Plus Cherry Dream Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9 pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, 6 tablespoons margarine, and 1 cup rolled oats. Mix until crumbly.
4. Reserve 1 cup crumbs for topping. To the remaining crumbs, add 1 egg; mix until well blended.
5. Press into the prepared pan.
6. Pour cherry pie filling over the crust, spreading to cover.
7. To the reserved crumbs in a large bowl, add the remaining 1/4 cup rolled oats, 2 tablespoons margarine, nuts, and brown sugar. Beat until thoroughly mixed.
8. Sprinkle over the cherry mixture.
9. Bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes or until golden brown. Cool completely.
10. Cut into small squares.
